channel.title: SDL2 on Hello World 大冒險
channel.description: Recent content in SDL2 on Hello World 大冒險

item.title: SDL2 環境配置
item.description:
下載 SDL2

pacman -S mingw-w64-x86_64-SDL2
mingw-w64-x86_64-SDL2_gfx
mingw-w64-x86_64-SDL2_image
mingw-w64-x86_64-SDL2_mixer
mingw-w64-x86_64-SDL2_net
mingw-w64-x86_64-SDL2_ttf

編譯參數

在 .vscode\tasks.json 中，照順序添加四個參數

"args": [
"-fdiagnostics-color=always",
"-g",
"${file}",
"-lmingw32", //參數1
"-mwindows", //參數2
"-lSDL2main", //參數3
"-lSDL2", //參數4
"-o",
"${fileDirname}\\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe"
],
